---
title: "Rosaceae (Rose family)"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

# Species in Rosaceae (Rose family)

## Species summary

| Species | Trees | Planted locations |
|---|---:|---|
| [Bird Cherry](/trees/species/bird-cherry.html) | 0 | — |
| [Common Hawthorn](/trees/species/common-hawthorn.html) | 0 | — |
| [Quince](/trees/species/quince.html) | 0 | — |
